# services.wasabibackend

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.wasabibackend`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.wasabibackend.customConfigFile` | `null or absolute path` | Defines the path to a custom configuration file that is copied to the user's directory. Overrides any config options. |
| `services.wasabibackend.dataDir` | `absolute path` | The data directory for the Wasabi backend node. |
| `services.wasabibackend.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Wasabi backend service. |
| `services.wasabibackend.endpoint.ip` | `string` | IP address for P2P connection to bitcoind. |
| `services.wasabibackend.endpoint.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port for P2P connection to bitcoind. |
| `services.wasabibackend.group` | `string` | The group as which to run the wasabibackend node. |
| `services.wasabibackend.network` | `one of "mainnet", "testnet", "regtest"` | The network to use for the Wasabi backend service. |
| `services.wasabibackend.rpc.ip` | `string` | IP address for RPC connection to bitcoind. |
| `services.wasabibackend.rpc.password` | `string` | RPC password for the bitcoin endpoint. Warning: this is stored in cleartext in the Nix store! Use `configFile` or `passwordFile` if needed. |
| `services.wasabibackend.rpc.passwordFile` | `null or absolute path` | File that contains the password of the RPC user. |
| `services.wasabibackend.rpc.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port for RPC connection to bitcoind. |
| `services.wasabibackend.rpc.user` | `string` | RPC user for the bitcoin endpoint. |
| `services.wasabibackend.user` | `string` | The user as which to run the wasabibackend node. |
